DigitalTopic: Evaluate the current state and trajectory of smcraft (State Machine Craft) toolkit across all its layers — Python, TypeScript, MCP, Web Designer — to identify priority areas for advancement

Model.Description: The .smdf.json definition format supports states (normal/final/history), events, transitions (external/internal), actions (code/timerStart/timerStop), parallel regions, composite nesting, and object references. Validation rules V001-V014 are specified.
Parses .smdf.json and .smdf.xml. Validates V001-V008, V012, V013. Missing: V009 (history only in composite), V010 (parallel has regions), V011 (parallel nextState valid), V014 (timer refs exist).
PythonCodeGenerator emits state enum, base state class, leaf state classes, context class, feeder classes. Produces runnable FSM code from SMDF. Only targets Python — no TypeScript target from CLI.
State, Context, ContextAsync, TransitionHelper, ObserverNull/Console/Logger. Timer support. Working — streetlight test confirms end-to-end. No pytest suite.
TypeScript mirrors Python: model, parser, runtime, codegen. Built and has dist/. Has test file. But smcg CLI does not target TypeScript — codegen exists in ts/src/codegen.ts but is not wired to CLI.

11 tools: create/add_state/add_event/add_transition/remove_state/validate/generate_code/get_definition/load_definition/list_states/list_events. In-memory only (no persistence across sessions). generate_code uses lightweight inline reimplementation, NOT the real PythonCodeGenerator.

SVG drag-and-drop canvas with state placement, transition wiring via draw mode, event picker popup, context menu, keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z/Y, Delete, Escape). Zustand store with 50-level undo. FLAT — collectAllStates() renders all states on one level, no composite drill-down.

The core open tension: data model supports recursive StateDef.states[] and ParallelDef, but neither the web canvas nor the MCP tools expose composite state drill-down. Users cannot visually model inner states of a parent or link inner-end to parent-exit.
Web designer 'Generate' button exports JSON definition only (CodePreview shows JSON). Does not call smcg CLI or any backend endpoint. Web and Python are disconnected — no FastAPI/REST bridge.
One working example (streetlight_app.py from MCP). No pytest suite for Python. TypeScript has one test file. No integration tests for web designer. No validation rule tests.

No smcraft/rispecs/ directory existed until now. Caishen specs 60-63 exist as upstream source but smcraft has no autonomous specs. An agent cannot re-implement smcraft from its own documentation alone.

KINSHIP.md mentions jgtutils, jgt-data-server, jgt-code but not mia-code-server. No rispecs in mia-code-server reference smcraft. Creative process stages (Germination → Assimilation → Completion) are natural FSM candidates but unmapped.
